name: Scheme For Adolescent Girls
benefit_description: Nutrition Component: Take Home Ration or Hot Cooked Meal for out of school girls - Nutrition Provision ₹ 9.50 per day (600 calories; 18‐20 gram of protein and recommended daily intake of micronutrients per day for 300 days in a year.). The financial norms will be ₹ 9.5/- per beneficiary per day for
details: A support scheme by Ministry of Women & Child Development enabling self-development and empowerment of out-of-school adolescent girls, and improving their nutritional, health & hygiene  status. ﻿ The scheme aims at supporting out of school AGs to successfully transition back to formal schooling or bridge learning / skill training. Upgrade their home-based skills and life skills. Provide information/guidance about existing public services such as Primary Health Centers, Rural Hospitals/CHCs, Post
eligibility_text: The applicant must be a FEMALE . The age of the applicant must be between 11 and 14 years .

scheme_category_raw: Health & Wellness, Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child
